[2026-04-08] FORMULA CHANGE: SwStr% multiplier removed (was double-counting K ability already in K/9). Replaced with career-relative delta (additive K/9 adjustment). Lambda bias reset to 0.0 — recalibrates from scratch under new formula.
[2026-04-08] Adaptive calibration step size: cap now scales with sqrt(n/30), range 0.05-0.15 instead of fixed 0.05.
[2026-04-08] Calibration season-filtered: only current-season picks (date >= 2026-03-01) used for bias calculation.
[2026-04-08] Added swstr_k9_scale=30.0 (calibratable): converts SwStr% career delta to additive K/9 adjustment.
[2026-04-08] EV tier thresholds adjusted: LEAN 1-3%, FIRE 1u 3-9%, FIRE 2u >9%

[2026-04-07] FIRE 1u EV threshold raised 3.0% → 3.5% (strong recent win rate)
[2026-04-07] Thresholds manually reset: fire1 and lean were miscalibrated to fire2 level, collapsing FIRE 1u tier and suppressing LEAN signals. Restored to lean=1%, fire1=3%, fire2=6%.
